summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Thryve Coworking landing page. All features working correctly including intro animation, navigation, gallery sections, footer links, and all sub-pages.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working: (1) Intro screen animation shows 'Hello Faridabad!' for ~3 seconds on homepage, (2) Header nav has About/Amenities/Pricing/Gallery/Team/Contact on homepage, (3) Gallery preview shows 4 images with 'View Full Gallery' button, (4) /gallery page shows all 11 images, (5) Footer has all 9 quick links (Home, About Us, Amenities, Pricing Plans, Gallery, Our Team, Contact Us, Blog, Sitemap), (6) Blog link correctly points to thryvecoworking.medium.com, (7) All images use customer-assets.emergentagent.com URLs (user's real photos), (8) Sub-pages (/pricing, /amenities, /contact, /gallery) all load correctly with Header and Footer, (9) Sub-page header shows Home/Amenities/Pricing/Gallery/Contact links, (10) WhatsApp and Email buttons work on Contact section.

homepage.header_navigation_links: PASS - All 6 links present (About, Amenities, Pricing, Gallery, Team, Contact)
homepage.footer_quick_links: PASS - All 9 links present with correct text
